name: Trap and Drain Calculator
seo_description: Trap and Drain Calculator. Number of fixtures, Stack length, Collector gradient (%) — get Traps, Stack diameter, Collector diameter instantly for your.
example_label: Calculatete traps and drains for 5 sanitary fixtures with 110mm downpipe.

range_hints.longitud_bajante_m: length from aparato más alejado to bajante principal

result_context: To {num_aparatos} aparatos with bajante of {length_bajante_m}m need {sifones_ud} sifones, {sumideros_ud} sumideros and {tuberia_m}m of pipe with {slope_pct}% of slope.
steps: Calculatete sifones: 5 aparatos = 5 sifones (1 per aparato)
Calculatete pipe with slope: 8m × 1.02 = 8.16m (ligeramente more per inclination)
mistakes: Not instalar trap in each aparato (entran olores)
Not prever ventilación of bajante (puede hacer sifonaje)
description: Plumbing trap and drain sizing based on fixtures and pipe diameter.
desc: Trap and Drain Calculator. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
